text.title: AI Sprint Planning Agent Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether ai-sprint-planning-agent applies. Root question is a concrete observable; branches name a specific input pattern (`when`) and conclude with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team have ≥4 sprints of velocity AND machine-readable calendar AND a willingness to use the agent?

example.description: When the root condition holds and the first matching branch fires, the tree concludes with the referenced rule id — meaning the methodology applies via that rule. The agent loads the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follows it. When the root condition does not hold, the tree concludes with `skip-methodology`.
